MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Oct-27-2022 Continued To Nov-03-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. R. MICHAEL LIEBERMAN, Esq. of Law Offices of R. Michael Lieberman (Tel: 415-929-3197) for plaintiff;
Atty. BRIDGET A. MCKINSTRY, Esq. of Law Offices of Thomas J. Burns (Tel: 415-227-2300) for defendants Atlas Towing Services, Inc. and Carlos Rodas.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF RORY ROBERTSON'S MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued.

The Court continues the matter to November 3, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. for further hearing before the pro tem judge.

In the interim, counsel for parties are to meet and confer on a proposed order. If an order on the motion is signed in advance, the further hearing date may be taken off calendar.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/JPT)
